The code uses find_next_sunday starting from year 2012, but the logic is wrong: It sets current_date = date(year, 4, 1) where year is 2012. Then while True: year += 1; next_date = date(year, 4, 1); if (next_date - current_date).days % 7 == 0: return year. But current_date remains 2012-04-01. So difference is days between 2012-04-01 and 2013-04-01, etc. That difference is 365 or 366 days. For 2013-04-01, difference is 365 days, mod 7 = 1, not 0. For 2014-04-01, difference is 730 days, mod 7 = 2? Actually 365+365=730, mod 7 = 2. For 2015-04-01, difference 1095 days, mod 7 = 3. For 2016-04-01, difference 1460 days, mod 7 = 4. For 2017-04-01, difference 1825 days, mod 7 = 5. For 2018-04-01, difference 2190 days, mod 7 = 6. So none of these are 0. Actually the difference between 2012-04-01 and 2018-04-01 is 2190 days, mod 7 = 6. So the code would never return 2018. But the mathproxyagent says 2018.
